recommendations.title: The Horror Show
recommendations.overview: Vowing revenge on the detective who apprehended him, serial killer "Meat Cleaver" Max Jenke returns from beyond the grave to launch a whole new reign of terror.

recommendations.title: Mute Witness
recommendations.overview: When a mute makeup/special effects artist working on a low-budget slasher film gets locked in a dilapidated Moscow movie studio late one night, she thinks she witnesses the making of a snuff film. Thus begins a night of terror.

recommendations.title: Madhouse
recommendations.overview: A young psychiatric intern unearths secrets about the mental health facility in which he works.

recommendations.title: Alone in the Dark 2
recommendations.overview: When the night falls, and the creatures of the dark are crawling out of the shadows, there is only one man who stands between us and evil: Edward Carnby.

recommendations.title: Bad Match
recommendations.overview: An internet-dating playboy's life spirals out of control after meeting a woman online.

recommendations.title: Stung
recommendations.overview: A fancy garden party turns into upper class prey when a colony of killer wasps mutates into seven foot tall predators.

recommendations.title: The Slammin' Salmon
recommendations.overview: The brutal former heavyweight boxing champion Cleon "Slammin'" Salmon (Duncan), now owner of a Miami restaurant, institutes a competition to see which waiter can earn the most money in one night: the winner stands to gain $10,000, while the loser wil

recommendations.title: Untraceable
recommendations.overview: Special Agent Jennifer Marsh works in an elite division of the FBI dedicated to fighting cybercrime. She thinks she has seen it all, until a particularly sadistic criminal arises on the Internet. This tech-savvy killer posts live feeds of his crimes

recommendations.title: Slaughterhouse Rulez
recommendations.overview: An illustrious British boarding school becomes a bloody battleground when a mysterious sinkhole appears at a nearby fracking site unleashing unspeakable horror.

recommendations.title: Patriots Day
recommendations.overview: In the aftermath of an unspeakable act of terror, Police Sergeant Tommy Saunders joins courageous survivors, first responders and investigators in a race against the clock to hunt down the Boston Marathon bombers before they strike again.
